title: ‘Donnyland’? Ukraine Proposes Naming Part of the Donbas in Trump’s Honor.
summary_full: The proposal reflects a global reality in which governments appeal to President Trump’s vanity to get American might on their side.
summary_public: The proposal reflects a global reality in which governments appeal to President Trump’s vanity to get American might on their side.
